mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hm.MEM_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER hm WHERE hm.MEM_ID = le.REG_ID) AS MEM_NAME FROM LEARNING AS le WHERE 1=1 ) le WHERE 1=1 AND le.DELETE_YN != 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hm.MEM_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER hm WHERE hm.MEM_ID = le.REG_ID) AS MEM_NAME FROM LEARNING AS le WHERE 1=1 ) le WHERE 1=1 AND le.DELETE_YN != 'Y' AND le.ID = #{id}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO LEARNING ( REG_ID , REG_DT , MOD_ID , MOD_DT , LEARN_NAME , LEARN_FILE_NAME , LEARN_FILE_SAVE_NAME , LEARN_FILE_URL , LEARN_FILE_SIZE , LEARN_FILE_UPLOAD_DT , LEARN_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{regId} , current_timestamp() , #{modId} , current_timestamp() , #{learnName} , #{learnFileName} , #{learnFileSaveName} , #{learnFileUrl} , #{learnFileSize} , current_timestamp() , #{learnStatus} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hm.MEM_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER hm WHERE hm.MEM_ID = le.REG_ID) AS MEM_NAME FROM LEARNING AS le WHERE 1=1 ) le WHERE 1=1 AND le.DELETE_YN != 'Y' AND le.LEARN_STATUS = '3'

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hm.MEM_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER hm WHERE hm.MEM_ID = le.REG_ID) AS MEM_NAME FROM LEARNING AS le WHERE 1=1 ) le WHERE 1=1 AND le.LEARN_NAME LIKE CONCAT('', #{learnName}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE LEARNING SET MOD_ID = #{modId} , MOD_DT = current_timestamp() , DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE ID = #{id} AND DELETE_YN != 'Y'

if.test: searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != '' and searchKeyword != 'undefined'

choose.when: AND ( LEARN_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR MEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )

if.test: learnStatus != null and learnStatus != '' and learnStatus != 'undefined'

choose.when: AND ( upper(LEARN_STATUS) LIKE CONCAT('%', '4', '%') OR upper(LEARN_STATUS) LIKE CONCAT('%', '3', '%') OR upper(LEARN_STATUS) LIKE CONCAT('%', '2', '%') OR upper(LEARN_STATUS) LIKE CONCAT('%', '1', '%') )

if.test: answerStatus != null and answerStatus != '' and answerStatus != 'undefined'

choose.when: AND upper(LEARN_STATUS) NOT LIKE CONCAT('%', '4', '%') AND upper(ANSWER_STATUS) LIKE CONCAT('%', '2', '%')
AND upper(LEARN_STATUS) LIKE CONCAT('%', '4', '%') AND upper(ANSWER_STATUS) LIKE CONCAT('%', '2', '%')
